scenario.name: VoLTE IMS Registration with IPSec
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[domain] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Route: <sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port];lr> From: <sip:[service]@[domain]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[domain]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:[service]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]>;expires=600000;+sip.instance="<urn:gsma:imei:35609204-079054-0>" Supported: path, gruu, sec-agree Require: sec-agree Proxy-Require: sec-agree Security-Client: [security_client] Authorization: Digest username="[service]@[domain]",realm="[domain]",uri="sip:[domain]",nonce="",response="" Max-Forwards: 70 Allow: INVITE, ACK, BYE, CANCEL, UPDATE, PRACK, NOTIFY, MESSAGE, REFER, OPTIONS User-Agent: SIPp-VoLTE/siphon-test Expires: 600000 Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:[domain] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Route: <sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port];lr> From: <sip:[service]@[domain]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[domain]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 REGISTER Contact: <sip:[service]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]>;expires=600000;+sip.instance="<urn:gsma:imei:35609204-079054-0>" [authentication username=[service]@[domain]] Supported: path, gruu, sec-agree Require: sec-agree Proxy-Require: sec-agree Security-Client: [security_client] Security-Verify: [security_verify] Max-Forwards: 70 Allow: INVITE, ACK, BYE, CANCEL, UPDATE, PRACK, NOTIFY, MESSAGE, REFER, OPTIONS User-Agent: SIPp-VoLTE/siphon-test Expires: 600000 Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:[domain] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Route: <sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port];lr> From: <sip:[service]@[domain]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[domain]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 3 REGISTER Contact: <sip:[service]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]>;expires=0 [authentication username=[service]@[domain]] Supported: path, gruu, sec-agree Require: sec-agree Proxy-Require: sec-agree Security-Client: [security_client] Security-Verify: [security_verify] Max-Forwards: 70 Allow: INVITE, ACK, BYE, CANCEL, UPDATE, PRACK, NOTIFY, MESSAGE, REFER, OPTIONS User-Agent: SIPp-VoLTE/siphon-test Expires: 0 Content-Length: 0
